violations.text: Raw animal foods (shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in kitchen refrigerator #2. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw foods are to be stored below RTE foods so as not to contaminate RTE foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Stopper for the sanitizer bay of the 3-bay sink is not functioning properly. Water is slowly draining from sink resulting in dilute sanitizer. Stopper from the rinse bay is being used for now until new stopper is obtained, and sanitizer bay no longer drains out water. Proper sanitizer concentration must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep table shelf, used for storing breads/rolls, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food/grease residue, and other debris. Protective covering of the shelf must be cleaned and sanitized or covering replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
